channel.title: b4dScript | Writeups
channel.description: Cybersecurity writeups and penetration testing notes

item.title: HTB Academy | Attacking Common Services Lab 3
item.description: This is a hard lab writeup from the htb module attacking common services

item.title: HTB Academy | Attacking Common Services lab 2
item.description: This is a medium lab writeup from the htb module attacking common services

item.title: HTB Academy | Attacking Common Services lab 1
item.description: This is a easy lab writeup from the htb module attacking common services

item.title: Hack The Box | Silo
item.description: Silo focuses mainly on leveraging Oracle to obtain a shell and escalate privileges. It was intended to be completed manually using various tools, however Oracle Database Attack Tool greatly simplifies the process, reducing the difficulty of the machine substantially.

item.title: Hack The Box | Reactor
item.description: Reactor is an easy Linux machine featuring Next.js 15.0.3 vulnerable to CVE-2025-55182 (React2Shell), leading to unauthenticated RCE. Lateral movement via SQLite credential dumping and MD5 cracking leads to a Node.js Inspector debug port for root privilege escalation.

item.title: Hack The Box | DevHub
item.description: DevHub is a medium Linux machine exploiting CVE-2026-23744 in MCPJam Inspector v1.4.2 for unauthenticated RCE. Internal enumeration reveals a Jupyter notebook and an OPSMCP API, leading to credential dumping and root via SSH key.
